metadata.name: Submit an Expedited Safety Report (e.g., 15-day report)

description: A serious, unexpected adverse event has been processed and must be submitted to the FDA within 15 calendar days.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the case has been fully processed and medically reviewed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the case is quality checked and ready for submission.

nodes.task_description: Generate the electronic submission file (e.g., an E2B XML file).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the E2B file from the safety database.

nodes.task_description: Submit the file to the health authority via the electronic submission gateway.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the file to the FDA gateway.

nodes.task_description: Receive and archive the electronic acknowledgement from the health authority.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the acknowledgement (MDN) and attaches it to the case record as proof of submission.
